A_management.description: Main interactive AI model coordinating all sub-models, monitoring task execution, adjusting strategies, and optimizing decisions using knowledge base

B_language.description: Multilingual interaction and emotional reasoning capabilities, enhanced by knowledge base for cross-domain understanding

C_audio.description: Speech recognition, tone analysis, voice synthesis, music recognition, noise identification, multi-band audio processing, sound effects generation, enhanced by knowledge base for audio understanding

D_image.description: Image content recognition, image editing, resolution adjustment, semantic and emotion-based image generation, enhanced by knowledge base for image understanding

E_video.description: Video content recognition, video editing, content modification, semantic and emotion-based video generation, enhanced by knowledge base for video understanding

F_spatial.description: Spatial recognition, visual modeling, positioning, distance perception, object volume recognition, motion tracking, self-location and movement state identification, enhanced by knowledge base for spatial understanding

G_sensor.description: Processing data from temperature, humidity, acceleration, velocity, displacement, 6-axis gyro, pressure, barometric, distance, IR, taste, smoke, and light sensors

H_computer_control.description: Command-based computer control with multi-OS compatibility, fulfilling requirements via MCP integration

I_knowledge.description: Comprehensive knowledge systems across all disciplines; assists other models in task completion and provides educational support

J_motion.description: Complex control based on sensor data, multi-port output, multi-protocol compatibility, external device control

K_programming.description: Programming assistance, autonomous code improvement for local models, system-wide enhancement via knowledge base, enabling AGI self-evolution
